name: Pumpkin Pie Squares
recipeInstructions:
- Combine flour, oats, brown sugar, and butter in a bowl. Mix until crumbly.
- Use a pastry blender or an electric mixer on low speed.
- Press dough into the bottom of an ungreased 8-by-12-inch baking pan.
- Bake for 10 minutes at 375 degrees.
- Combine pumpkin (1 cup), evaporated skim milk (13.5 oz), eggs, sugar (3/4 cup),
salt (1/2 tsp), ground cinnamon (1/2 tsp), ground ginger (1/2 tsp),
nutmeg (1 tsp), and ground cloves (1/4 tsp) in a mixing bowl or food processor.
- Beat or process well until smooth.
- Pour the mixture into the baked crust.
- Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, until a sharp knife comes out clean from the center.
- Cut into squares and serve with Chantilly Cream.
Nutritional info per serving: 250 cal; 6g pro, 38g carb, 9g fat (31%)
Exchanges: .3 milk, 2.3g bread, .2 meat, 1.8 fat
